introSection: Voltron Nevera is a steel launched semi-floorless roller coaster currently operating at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On 1 January 2023, Europa-Park announced that the opening of the coaster would be delayed until 2024 due to delays in sourcing materials.

The coaster opened on 26 April 2024.

fullText:
Voltron Nevera is a steel launched semi-floorless roller coaster currently operating at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

On 1 January 2023, Europa-Park announced that the opening of the coaster would be delayed until 2024 due to delays in sourcing materials.

The coaster opened on 26 April 2024.
